heading: Enforcement of Convention
label: 301 Enforcement of Convention
text: The Inter-American Convention on International Commercial Arbitration of , shall be enforced in United States courts in accordance with this chapter.January 30, 1975
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that: The Convention entered into force for the United States on .Pub. L. 101–369, § 3104 Stat. 450Aug. 15, 1990Oct. 27, 1990“This Act [enacting this chapter] shall take effect upon the entry into force of the Inter-American Convention on International Commercial Arbitration of , with respect to the United States.”January 30, 1975
